item.text: I found one concrete coverage gap and one contract-strengthening opportunity. The log template still doesn’t carry an explicit `Last Completed Checkpoint`, and the recoverability test only checks loose string containment instead of proving the labeled block can be read as structured state, so I’m tightening both before rerunning the gate.

I’m putting the coverage tightening into the log-template contract tests first so the gap is explicit: last completed checkpoint in the run overview, plus a stricter readback of the continuation-handle block rather than simple substring checks.

item.text: The red check found the exact gap I expected: active story and phase were in the log, but the last completed checkpoint wasn’t. I’m adding that to the run-overview template now and then I’ll rerun the full gate.

item.text:
**findings fixed**

- `P2-01`: The resume model required active story, current phase, and last completed checkpoint to be recoverable from disk, but the log template only carried the first two. Added `Last Completed Checkpoint` to the run overview.
  files changed: [processes/impl-cli/core/log-template.ts](/Users/leemoore/code/liminal-spec/processes/impl-cli/core/log-template.ts:81), [processes/impl-cli/tests/log-template-contract.test.ts](/Users/leemoore/code/liminal-spec/processes/impl-cli/tests/log-template-contract.test.ts:92)
- `P2-02`: The continuation-handle recoverability test was too shallow. Tightened it to parse the labeled block structurally and explicitly cover both the `none` sentinel state and a filled handle state.
  files changed: [processes/impl-cli/tests/log-template-contract.test.ts](/Users/leemoore/code/liminal-spec/processes/impl-cli/tests/log-template-contract.test.ts:7)

**findings surfaced to orchestrator**

- none

**mock/shim audit findings**

- none

**pass-1 addition defense**

- still warranted: `yes`
- real teaching: `yes`
- note: the explicit `none` sentinel is now materially stronger because the contract test proves it is distinguishable from a filled continuation handle block and no longer relies on loose substring checks alone

**files changed in this pass**

- [processes/impl-cli/core/log-template.ts](/Users/leemoore/code/liminal-spec/processes/impl-cli/core/log-template.ts:81)
- [processes/impl-cli/tests/log-template-contract.test.ts](/Users/leemoore/code/liminal-spec/processes/impl-cli/tests/log-template-contract.test.ts:7)

**gate result after this pass**

- `pass` — `bun run green-verify` passed (`193 pass`, `0 fail`)

**recommended next step**

- Proceed to self-review pass 3 of 3, focusing on residual boundary risk and any subtle overreach beyond Story 7’s recovery/process-contract scope.
